text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is talking to her reflection in the
middle of dance practice.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Opera O of the mirror... How did you achieve
such beauty?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Charms powerful enough to entice even I, the
Centurial Overlord... Your loveliness is terrifying!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I shall not give in! For I am destined to stand
at the peak atop the mountain path of
Overlordship!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Argh! You've yet to surrender, even after our
arduous battle...

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O! Do I have to tell you again? I'm
locking up the studio now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: B-But! I have yet to resolve this epic conflict!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is forced to prematurely withdraw from
her battle, the shock of which leaves her in a rut.
